testcase.name: test_upload_logo_png

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain logo_base64 assert 'logo_base64' in {'logo': 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==', 'message': 'Logo téléchargé avec succès'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ui_bugs_iteration20.py:177: in test_upload_logo_png assert "logo_base64" in data, "Response should contain logo_base64" E AssertionError: Response should contain logo_base64 E assert 'logo_base64' in {'logo': 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==', 'message': 'Logo téléchargé avec succès'}

testcase.name: test_create_client
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ui_bugs_iteration20.py:328: in test_create_client assert response.status_code == 201, f"Create client failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create client failed: {"id":"fb356c5c-c785-45b7-801a-35253405e623","name":"TEST_NewClient_dcbe12","address":"456 New Street","phone":"0698765432","email":"newclient@test.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:09:33.675191+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_single_client
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_ui_bugs_iteration20.py:311: in test_client_id assert response.status_code == 201, f"Create client failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create client failed: {"id":"a7c8424b-685e-4ec4-baaf-57751644ae1b","name":"TEST_Client_c76fde","address":"123 Test Street","phone":"0612345678","email":"testclient@test.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:09:34.381536+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_client
